data.current_summary: Get audio files for a chapter
data.current_description: Get audio files for a chapter
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves audio recitation files for a specific Quranic chapter from a selected reciter. Requires the recitation_id (reciter identifier) and chapter_number (1-114). Returns audio file URLs and metadata for all verses in the chapter. Useful for accessing complete chapter recitations by specific reciters.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks critical details about required parameters (recitation_id and chapter_number), what the response contains, and the practical use case. An AI agent needs to understand the parameter meanings and valid ranges to construct proper requests. The improved description specifies parameter requirements and clarifies the response content.

message: Operation 'getUthmaniScript' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context, poor_ai_interpretability. data.description_suggestion: Retrieves Quranic verses in Uthmani script (the standardized Ottoman orthography used in official Quran texts). Accepts optional verse range parameters to filter results. Returns verse objects containing Uthmani text representation along with verse metadata. Uthmani script is the canonical text format used in most printed Qurans.
data.reasoning: The current description provides no context about what Uthmani script is, what parameters are accepted, or what the response contains. An AI agent unfamiliar with Islamic terminology needs domain context to understand this operation's purpose. The improved description explains the domain concept, parameter usage, response structure, and why this format matters.

data.current_summary: Get a specific verse by key (e.g. 1:1)
data.current_description: Get a specific verse by key (e.g. 1:1)
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a specific verse from the Quran using its verse key in the format chapter:verse (e.g., 1:1 for the first verse of Chapter 1). data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all verses contained on a specific page of the standard Mushaf (Quranic manuscript). Returns verse objects for the requested page number with verse text, translations, and metadata. The Mushaf page numbering follows the standard Ottoman/Medina Mushaf pagination (1-604 pages).

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all verses contained in a specific juz (one of 30 equal divisions of the Quran). Returns verse objects for the requested juz number with verse text, translations, and metadata. Juz numbers range from 1 to 30, commonly used for organized Quranic study.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks context about what a juz is and its significance. Added explanation that juz is one of 30 divisions, specified the numbering range, and clarified the return format to help AI agents understand this retrieval method and when to use it.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all verses contained in a specific hizb (one of 60 subdivisions of the Quran, with 2 hizbsper juz).
